news.headline: Central bank will remain flexible on interest rates, keeping an open attitude, says ECB's Lane.
Growatt introduces solar and energy storage solutions at Intersolar Europe 2024 in Munich, from June 19 to 21.
news.summary: In Berlin on June 27, 2024, Growatt, a renowned company in the field of distributed energy solutions, presented its wide range of products at Intersolar Europe 2024 in Munich from June 19 to 21. The event highlighted the company's latest innovations tailored to address the needs of the market.

news.headline: Manuel Melles appointed as Appian's Regional VP in France and DACH, aims to drive growth in Central Europe.
news.summary: A new development in the tech industry reveals that Manuel Melles, the former VP at Software AG, has recently joined Appian, a company listed on Nasdaq under ticker symbol APPN. His role as the Regional Vice President for Partners in Central Europe will involve spearheading business partnerships and driving growth for the company in the region. This move signifies potential business expansion opportunities for Appian in Central Europe, with Melles being tasked to lead the efforts in advancing the company's presence and influence in the tech market. This significant appointment is reflective of Appian's strategic vision and commitment to business development.

news.headline: Report by Nutiani and Ipsos shows strong consumer interest in healthy ageing, with 88% having a preventive mindset.
news.summary: In Auckland, New Zealand, on June 27, 2024, Nutiani released their newest Consumer Health and Nutrition Index, developed with Ipsos, revealing a notable trend towards healthy aging among consumers. According to the study, 88% of participants demonstrated a strong emphasis on preventive measures for maintaining their health as they age. This data underscores a rising interest in proactively preserving one's well-being among consumers.

news.headline: Researchers in Japan develop thermoelectric generator using radiative cooling and solar heating to produce electricity.
news.summary: In Tsukuba, Japan, a team of researchers at the Research Center for Materials Nanoarchitectonics (MANA) have created a groundbreaking thermoelectric generator. This generator utilizes both radiative cooling and solar heating to generate electricity, potentially revolutionizing the way power is produced. This innovation has sparked interest due to its dual functionality and potential applications in various industries. The development of this generator signifies a significant advancement in renewable energy technology.

news.headline: Report by Arthur D. Little Blue Shift Institute outlines 5 climate change adaptation scenarios, focusing on relevant technologies.
news.summary: In an extensive report titled "We’re doomed, now what?", unveiled in London, five possible scenarios for adaptation are outlined along with key technologies to prioritize. The report delves into strategies for confronting challenges and suggests focusing on specific technologies.

news.headline: Beroe invests in Forestreet to enhance AI capabilities for procurement intelligence. Deal strengthens Beroe's position with category-level insights.
news.summary: A recent agreement has been made that will further enhance Beroe's position as a leader in category-level procurement intelligence. This deal includes the incorporation of supplier insights. Taking place on June 27, 2024, the agreement involves Beroe, a prominent provider of a SaaS procurement intelligence and analytics platform popular among a majority of Fortune 500 companies. This partnership, established between parties in Raleigh, N.C. and London, signifies a significant step forward for Beroe in expanding their capabilities within the procurement sector.

news.headline: Faraday joins Intel Foundry Accelerator Design Services to advance ASIC design solutions in Taiwan.
news.summary: In Hsinchu, Taiwan, Faraday has announced its participation in the Intel Foundry Accelerator Design Services program. This marks a major step forward in enhancing ASIC design solutions.

news.headline: IDnow, a Munich-based identity platform provider, celebrates its tenth anniversary after revolutionizing KYC space.
news.summary: A company in Munich known for leading in identity verification has reflected on a decade of transforming the Know Your Customer (KYC) sector. IDnow, based in Munich, has highlighted their achievements in the past ten years. They specialize in providing identity verification services in Europe. The company aims to continue focusing on developing reusable identities and trust services as part of their commitment to innovation and growth. This reflects their dedication to modernizing the industry and adapting to changing customer needs. The milestone was marked on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Italy's consumer confidence exceeds forecast at 98.3, up from previous 96.4.
MainStreaming strengthens partnership with Fincons, an IT consulting company with over 2800 professionals in Europe.
news.summary: Milan, June 27, 2024 - MainStreaming, a company specializing in intelligent media delivery, has revealed an enhanced strategic alliance with Fincons. Fincons, a top international IT business consulting and system integration firm, boasts a workforce of over 2800 professionals across Europe.

news.headline: Italian manufacturing sector confidence drops to 86.8, missing forecast of 88.6 and down from previous 88.4.
Pharmanutra S.p.A. partners with SMS Pharma to distribute 3 iron-based dietary supplements in Mexico under Sucrosom®. Expanding global reach.
news.summary: Partner SMS Pharma has announced plans to market three products from the SiderAL® line under the brand name Sucrosom®. This initiative is based on their patented Sucrosomial® Technology. The announcement was made in PISA, Italy, on June 27, 2024. This development marks a significant advancement in the company's ongoing efforts to expand into international markets.

news.headline: Melco Resorts & Entertainment wins 2024 BEST Award for talent development by ATD, highlighting "Whole Person Development."
news.summary: In Macau on June 27, 2024, Melco Resorts & Entertainment received the prestigious 2024 BEST Award from the Association for Talent Development (ATD). This award is considered the most rigorous and sought-after recognition in the talent development industry. It is given globally to organizations that exhibit comprehensive success in talent development practices. Melco was honored for its implementation of the "Whole Person Development" philosophy, which focuses on holistic growth and development.

news.headline: Trotters Childrenswear partners with ShipEngine to streamline shipping in the UK, enhancing efficiency and customer experience.
news.summary: In London, ShipEngine, a prominent shipping API provider, has been chosen by Trotters Childrenswear, an independent children’s clothing retailer, to oversee its delivery operations throughout the UK. This partnership will see Trotters Childrenswear utilizing ShipEngine’s API solution to streamline shipping processes, enhance operational productivity, and deliver a superior ecommerce experience to its customers. Initially catering to small and medium businesses, ShipEngine's selection by Trotters Childrenswear underscores its reputation as a leading shipping API platform.

news.headline: Dr. Ron Britten appointed as Technical Advisor to advance Atlantic Nickel Project, bringing expertise in economic geology and nickel.
news.summary: Dr. Ron Britten, a renowned economic geologist and expert in nickel, has been appointed as a Technical Advisor by First Atlantic. Dr. Britten will be contributing his expertise towards advancing the Atlantic Nickel Project.

news.headline: Eurozone money supply (M3) growth exceeds forecast at 1.6% (1.5% predicted, 1.3% previously).
"Bleach: Brave Souls" introduces new swimsuit characters in Swimsuit Zenith Summons starting June 30. 3D action game by KLab Inc. Read more in original press release.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, KLab Inc. revealed the upcoming Summons event in their popular 3D action game, Bleach: Brave Souls. The event will showcase 2024 Swimsuit versions of Bambietta, Candice, and Meninas. It is set to commence on Sunday, June 30. For more details, interested individuals can refer to the official press release on KLab's website.

news.headline: Scandinavian Tobacco Group buys Mac Baren Tobacco Company.
SANY Marine & SGP sign agreement to enhance sustainability in Saudi Arabian ports on June 25th, 2024.
news.summary: In Shanghai on June 25, 2024, SANY Marine, a branch of SANY Heavy Industry, finalized a significant deal with Saudi Global Ports Company (SGP), a collaboration of PSA International and domestic entities. The agreement aims to advance sustainability and strategic initiatives.

news.headline: World Travel Holdings ranked #16 in Travel Weekly's 2024 Power List, among the top retail travel agencies.
news.summary: In the latest annual survey, the leading retailer in the industry, World Travel Holdings, has secured the 16th position in Travel Weekly's 2024 Power List of top retail travel agencies. The survey ranks the industry's most successful players and highlights their achievements. This recognition signifies World Travel Holdings' prominent position in the market and reflects its significant impact within the travel agency sector.

news.headline: Tom Tacon named Business Unit Director of Bionical Virtual Engagement in Willington, England on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In Willington, England on June 27, 2024, Bionical Solutions, a prominent company offering technology-enabled engagement and healthcare services to pharmaceutical, biotech, healthcare firms, and the NHS, revealed the selection of Tom Tacon as the new Business Unit Director.

news.headline: Resolution Therapeutics gets MHRA approval for Phase I/II EMERALD study on liver cirrhosis therapy. (Characters: 86)
news.summary: A study named EMERALD will be conducted to assess the safety and effectiveness of engineered macrophage cell therapy in individuals suffering from decompensated liver cirrhosis. The study will take place in London and Edinburgh, Scotland. Resolution Therapeutics Limited will be overseeing the clinical trial, which is scheduled to begin on June 27, 2024. This research aims to provide valuable insights into the treatment of liver cirrhosis and will involve a significant number of participants to gather comprehensive data.

news.headline: Upcoming auction tender announcement for certificate sale. Stay tuned for details. #auction #certificate #tender
2024 Dalian Summer Davos Forum begins at Dalian Donggang Business District, hosting guests for conferences and cultural discussions by Dalian Bay.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, the Dalian Donggang Business District in China hosted the 2024 Dalian Summer Davos Forum, serving as a hub for conferences, business activities, leisure, and culture. The event brought together a diverse group of domestic and international guests along the shores of Dalian Bay. During the forum, participants engaged in discussions on various topics, highlighting the significance of the district as a multifunctional space for collaboration and exchange.

news.headline: Huhtamaki provides support for Plan’s Girl Award to empower and promote equality among girls.
Swedish Riksbank Rate steady at 3.75%, matching forecast and previous rate.
Positive results from Medivir's trial on Fostrox + Lenvima® show 24% overall response rate for second-line liver cancer patients. #Medivir #ESMOGI
news.summary: Promising results have emerged from Medivir's Phase 1b/2a open label trial involving fostrox + Lenvima® for second-line hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) patients, known to be challenging to treat. The treatment combination showcased a noteworthy 24% overall response rate (ORR). Furthermore, the estimated median time to treatment failure was found to be significant among the patient population under consideration.

news.headline: Owner of Campari denies allegations of €1 billion in unpaid taxes.
US stocks close higher as Nasdaq set for 19% gain in first half of 2024 after Nvidia surge. Fear and Greed Index shows improvement.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a slight improvement in market sentiment, although it remained in the "Fear" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks had a mostly positive close, with the Nasdaq Composite seeing a 0.5% increase during the session. The Nasdaq has shown a significant gain of 18.6% in the first half of the year, driven by a surge in NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) shares. Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) reached new all-time highs on Wednesday, influenced by various developments. BofA Securities analyst Justin Post upheld a Buy rating for Amazon.com. For more details, check out the complete story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Binance updates collateral ratios for multiple assets in Portfolio Margin, impacting uniMMR for PEPE, WIF, LISTA, IO, ZRO, ZK and NOT.
news.summary: Binance has revealed changes to collateral ratios for multiple assets within Portfolio Margin, impacting users' Unified Maintenance Margin Ratio (uniMMR). This adjustment will influence the required maintenance margin for traders using this feature on the platform.

news.headline: US gov’t transfers 3,940 Bitcoin to Coinbase; seized from drug dealer Banmeet Singh in Jan 2024 trial: Arkham Intelligence
news.summary: According to Arkham Intelligence data, a significant amount of Bitcoin was confiscated from Banmeet Singh, who is a known drug dealer with a criminal record, at his trial in January 2024.

news.headline: Akastor ASA to present Q2 results on July 11, 2024, at 15:00 CET. CEO and CFO to lead the webcast.
news.summary: Akastor ASA, based in Oslo, Norway, will be hosting a webcast to present their financial results for the first quarter of 2024. The event is scheduled for Thursday, July 11, 2024, at 15:00 CET. CEO Karl Erik Kjelstad and Øyvind will be the presenters. This event is an opportunity for investors and analysts to gain insights into the company's performance during the first quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Advantest's VOICE 2024 in San Diego attracted record attendance with major semiconductor companies discussing latest technologies.
news.summary: The annual developer conference recently brought together major semiconductor companies for discussions on the latest technologies and industry trends. The event featured participation from leading companies in the semiconductor sector, with a focus on addressing key issues and advancements in the industry. Attendees had the opportunity to engage in dialogue regarding cutting-edge technologies and emerging trends shaping the semiconductor landscape. This conference serves as a crucial platform for professionals to exchange insights and collaborate on innovative solutions.

news.headline: Crédit Mutuel Alliance Fédérale partners with IBM to deploy generative AI, saving nearly 1 million advisor hours.
news.summary: In Strasbourg, France, and Armonk, New York, on June 27, 2024, Crédit Mutuel Alliance Fédérale, known for its early embrace of Artificial Intelligence (AI) starting in 2016, is making significant investments in advanced technologies. With AI integrated into the daily operations of its 25,000 advisors, the company has saved almost 1 million hours through automation and innovation.

news.headline: OPEC Fund Development Forum in Vienna concludes with commitments, new projects, and partnerships to address global development challenges.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, the third OPEC Fund Development Forum took place in Vienna, a global event focused on South-South cooperation. The event saw the conclusion of the forum with notable commitments, new project signings, and partnership agreements being made. Participants pledged to address pressing global development challenges, with a particular focus on climate change. Key figures involved included representatives from various countries, organizations, and businesses, indicating a strong collective effort towards sustainable and impactful development initiatives.

news.headline: OSS Ventures secures €8.5 million in funding to advance operations and fuel the future of factories.
news.summary: In a recent development on June 27, 2024, OSS Ventures, a prominent industrial start-up studio based in France, excitedly disclosed a successful fundraising of €8.5 million. The financing round was spearheaded by Tikehau Capital and France 2030's French Tech Accélération 2 fund, supported by Bpifrance.

news.headline: Darktrace wins 2024 Microsoft UK Partner of the Year Award for outstanding innovation - global recognition.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Cambridge, UK on June 27, 2024, Darktrace was revealed as the recipient of the prestigious UK 2024 Microsoft Partner of the Year Award. This accolade signifies Darktrace's achievement in standing out from a competitive worldwide pool of Microsoft partners by showcasing outstanding innovation and customer implementation strategies.

news.headline: abrdn money market fund now accessible and transferable on Algorand blockchain using Quantoz EURD token, with "no-code" atomic settlement.
news.summary: Today, the Algorand Foundation, Archax, and Quantoz Payments revealed a groundbreaking development in the trading realm. Algorand's unique "no-code" atomic settlement feature eliminates the need for smart contract code, streamlining trading processes. This innovation was announced in Barcelona, Spain, London, and Utrecht, The Netherlands on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Meristem introduces EXCAVATOR® AMS, combining surfactant, conditioner, residue breakdown, and nutrient release. Save on synthetic fertilizer costs. Columbus, Ohio - June 27, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Columbus, Ohio, Meristem Crop Performance®, has revealed a new product, EXCAVATOR® AMS, on June 27, 2024. This innovative formulation of EXCAVATOR is enhanced by the patented MICROBILIZE™ technology, aiming to reduce costs associated with synthetic fertilizer and adjuvant purchases. This new development is targeted at providing a more convenient application method for users.

news.headline: Mintos introduces Smart Cash with BlackRock-managed fund to optimize cash holdings, providing diverse investment choices.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Berlin, Mintos, a prominent multi-asset platform that provides a blend of alternative and traditional investment choices, has introduced its newest product: Mintos Smart Cash. This new offering is a money market fund aimed at diversifying investment options for users.

news.headline: Pan Finance announced Q2 award winners of 2024; USA, UK had modest inflation declines, Euro Area facing rising inflation.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, it was reported that inflation rates exhibited modest decreases in the USA and the UK, while the Euro Area experienced a continual increase. The global economic growth is constrained by factors such as geopolitical conflicts, unstable trade partnerships, and severe climate phenomena. The respective inflation rate changes in the USA and the UK were minimal, with a slight decline, while the Euro Area observed a persistent upward trend. These trends are indicative of the challenges faced in the current economic landscape, influenced by geopolitical tensions, fluctuating trade agreements, and environmental disruptions.

news.headline: LabTrace uses blockchain for data integrity in Parkinson's disease study by King's College London on clinical observation data; Algorand blockchain used.
news.summary: A recent study on Parkinson's disease funded by King's College London has utilized the Algorand blockchain to validate clinical data. LabTrace, a blockchain platform focused on ensuring data integrity and verifying ownership, made this announcement on June 27, 2024. This development highlights the increasing significance of blockchain technology in scientific research.

news.headline: Top to bottom: AUD, JPY, NZD, GBP, EUR, CAD, CHF, USD - current currency strength chart without a specified source.
Stock futures down Thursday. Walgreens expected to report earnings of $0.71/share on revenue of $36B, shares up 0.6% after-hours. Micron Tech exceeds financial expectations.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures are down, drawing attention to specific stocks for investors. Wall Street projects Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc. (NASDAQ: WBA) to announce earnings of $0.71 per share with revenue hitting $36.00 billion before the market opens. Walgreens' shares rose 0.6% to $15.75 in after-hours trading. Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ: MU) also revealed better-than-anticipated financial performance. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Frontgrade Gaisler wins ESA contract to qualify GR716B microcontroller for spacecraft avionics, under Core Competitiveness program. Prototype launch expected this year.
news.summary: A company based in Gothenburg, Sweden called Frontgrade Gaisler has been awarded a contract by the European Space Agency (ESA) under the ARTES Core Competitiveness programme. The contract aims to qualify their GR716B microcontroller for flight. This microcontroller is known for being radiation-hardened and is used in space applications, particularly in spacecraft avionics. The prototype of this advanced microcontroller is set to be launched later this year. The ESA contract will assist in the thorough flight qualification process.

news.headline: South Korean gov't, NH Bank, & OurCrowd create $80M fund for DeepTech investments. $48M already raised. OurCrowd mobilizing 240K investors globally.
news.summary: A venture investor from Israel, OurCrowd, has been chosen by the South Korean government to jointly manage a bilateral investment fund aimed at supporting startups in both nations. The fund is set to reach $80 million, with $48 million already secured by the Korean partners NH Venture Investment and K-Growth. OurCrowd is in the process of raising funds from its extensive network of over 240,000 registered investors globally. The collaborative fund will facilitate investments in promising startups.

news.headline: Konvi offers exclusive investment opportunity in Alec Monopoly-designed Birkin bag.
news.summary: In Dublin, Konvi has revealed a rare chance for investors to partake in the release of a unique Birkin bag crafted by Alec Monopoly.

news.headline: GXO honored by Ex-Forces in Business for backing UK veterans. Nominated for Employer of the Year again.
news.summary: A prominent logistics company in the UK has been recognized as a nominee for the prestigious Employer of the Year Award for the second consecutive year by Ex-Forces in Business. This accolade highlights the company's dedication to supporting and empowering veterans in the workforce.

news.headline: Revolutionize your gardening with the Yard Force Cordless Tiller at Peavey Mart Canada. #EcoFriendly #Innovative #GardenMaintenance.
news.summary: Yard Force, a well-known brand in outdoor power equipment, is excited to launch the Yard Force Brushless Cordless Battery Rear Tine Tiller at Peavey Mart Canada. This new tiller provides Canadian homeowners with a powerful and environmentally friendly option for garden maintenance. The innovative equipment aims to revolutionize gardening routines by offering exceptional performance. The Yard Force Brushless Cordless Battery Rear Tine Tiller is now available, offering a sustainable solution to gardening needs.
